title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay tariffs, rare earths — May 14-15 Beijing
snippet: Iran war likely to dominate Trump-Xi summit May 14-15 in Beijing. Treasury Sec Bessent confirms Iran will be a topic. Trump seeks PRC support for Iran agreement. Unresolved Iran conflict gives Xi upper hand. Beijing is Iran's biggest oil buyer. Less scope for tariffs/rare earth resolution.
tag_reason: New analysis on Iran's impact on Trump-Xi summit agenda; Bessent statement not previously reported
